title: New Kiss Loader Malware Uses Early Bird APC Injection in Emerging Attack Campaig

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - New Kiss Loader Malware Uses Early Bird APC Injection in Eme
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/02
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*ccv.js*'
            - '*gg.bat*'
            - '*oa.wsh*'
            - '*ov.bin*'
            - '*pdf.url*'
            - '*pol.bat*'
            - '*tv.bin*'
            - '*vwo.zip*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_New_Kiss_Loader_Malware_Uses_Early_Bird_ {
    meta:
        description = "New Kiss Loader Malware Uses Early Bird APC Injection in Eme"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "130ca411a3ef6c37dbd0b1746667b1386c3ac3be089c8177bc8bee5896ad2a02" ascii nocase
        $h1 = "2b40a8a79b6cf90160450caaad12f9c178707bead32bcc187deb02f71c25c354" ascii nocase
        $h2 = "549c1f1998f22e06dde086f70f031dbf5a3481bd3c5370d7605006b6a20b5b0b" ascii nocase
        $h3 = "5cab6bf65f7836371d5c27fbfc20fe10c0c4a11784990ed1a3d2585fa5431ba6" ascii nocase
        $h4 = "6abd118a0e6f5d67bfe1a79dacc1fd198059d8d66381563678f4e27ecb413fa7" ascii nocase
        $h5 = "6d62b39805529aefe0ac0270a0b805de6686d169348a90866bf47a07acde2284" ascii nocase
        $h6 = "b4525711eafbd70288a9869825e5bb3045af072b5821cf8fbc89245aba57270a" ascii nocase
        $h7 = "e8dbdab0afac4decce1e4f8e74cc1c1649807f791c29df20ff72701a9086c2a0" ascii nocase
        $h8 = "e8f83d67a6b894399fad774ac196c71683de9ddca3cf0441bb95318f5136b553" ascii nocase
